name: Brutal A Taste of Violence.
overview: Axel Chen, ex-special ops, is a nightclub bouncer. One night, during a fight, he kills one of his attackers. From then on, he's on the run, forced into fighting for a living, both to survive and prove his innocence.

trailers.title: "Brutal" A Taste of Violence. Episode 1, Studio+, David Belle, Byron Gibson, Vithaya Pansringarm
